name: aurora-oauth
title: Aurora OAuth
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: OAuth consent screen with app icon, scope checklist (sensitive scopes highlighted in warn color), and Allow/Deny buttons. Success/callback state with animated SVG check and close-window message. Token management table with token name, scopes chips, created date, last used, and Revoke button.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/oauth.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`.
